Package org.c02e.jpgpj

Enum Class HashingAlgorithm

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<HashingAlgorithm>
org.c02e.jpgpj.HashingAlgorithm
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<HashingAlgorithm>, Constable
public enum HashingAlgorithm extends Enum<HashingAlgorithm>
Available hash algorithms for signing message content, and for deriving a symmetric key from a passphrase.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static HashingAlgorithm[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static HashingAlgorithm valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getOpenPgpTag

      public int getOpenPgpTag()
      OpenPGP hash algorithm tag (RFC 4880 / RFC 9580).
      Since:
      2.1.0

    • fromOpenPgpTag

      public static HashingAlgorithm fromOpenPgpTag(int tag)
      Resolves a Bouncy Castle / OpenPGP hash tag to the matching enum value, or null if unknown.
      Since:
      2.1.0
